title: Rules and regulations
doc_html:
§1113.6. Rules and regulations

            The secretary of the Louisiana Department of Health shall promulgate rules and regulations necessary to carry out the provisions of this Part in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act.

            Acts 1987, No. 234, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1299.146 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
§1113.6.  Rules and regulations
The secretary of the Louisiana Department of Health shall promulgate rules and
regulations necessary to carry out the provisions of this Part in accordance with the
Administrative Procedure Act.
Acts 1987, No. 234, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1299.146 by HCR 84 of 2015
R.S.
